MEMORANDUM IN SUPPORT OF MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER DISCOVERY RESPONSES AND FOR SANCTIONS BY JOHN A. KITHAS AND CHRISTOPHER LAND (TRANSACTION ID # 210077426) FILED BY CROSS DEFENDANT KITHAS, JOHN A. LAND, CHRISTOPHER

DISCOVERY 302, MAY-29-2024 RE PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER DISCOVERY RESPONSES AND FOR SANCTIONS BY JOHN A. KITHAS AND CHRISTOPHER LAND. NO APPEARANCE WAS MADE BY ANY PARTY, COUNSEL, OR INTERESTED PERSON. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. NO OPPOSITION FILED. MOTION IS GRANTED. SEE MINUTES FOR COMPLETE RULING. THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER REPEATING VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE TENTATIVE RULING AND MUST E-MAIL IT TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM TO SCHWARTZ@CMSLAW.COM. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANDY SCHWARTZ. CLERK: R. WOODS. NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)
DECLARATION OF ATTORNEY BENJAMIN C. GRAVES IN SUPPORT OF EX PARTE MOTION FOR ORDER ALLOWING MANDATORY WITHDRAWAL AS COUNSEL (TRANSACTION ID # 73717972) FILED BY DEFENDANT THOMAS, BRANDILYNN S.
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL (PER 7/19/24 EX PARTE) HEARING SET FOR JUL-25-2024 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

DISCOVERY 525, CROSS DEFENDANT JOHN KITHAS, CHRISTOPHER LAND'S MOTION FOR SANCTIONS AGAINST BRANDI THOMAS GRANTED IN PART, AND DENIED IN PART. DEFENDANT BRANDI THOMAS TO PROVIDE CODE COMPLIANT RESPONSES TO MOVING PARTIES' DISCOVERY REQUESTS WITHIN (2) TWO WEEKS OF THE DATE OF THIS ORDER. DEFENDANT THOMAS IS ORDERED TO PAY SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $3,000.00 WITHIN (2) TWO WEEKS OF THE DATE OF THIS ORDER. MOVING PARTY'S REQUEST FOR ISSUE AND EVIDENTIARY SANCTIONS IS DENIED. BOTH PARTIES SHALL SIMULTANEOUSLY SUBMIT ONE-PAGE LETTER BRIEFS BY FRIDAY, OCTOBER 11, 2024. THE COURT WILL ISSUE AN ORDER. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANDY SCHWARTZ; CLERK: FELICIA GREEN; NOT REPORTED; DEPT. 525.

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-04-2024 Vacated

Notice Of And Motion For Sanctions Against Brandi Thomas By John A. Kithas And Christopher Land
Off Calendar Oct-04-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
John Kithas, of Law Offices of John A. Kithas, Tel: (415) 788-8100, for plaintiffs;
Paul Frassetto, of Frassetto Law Offices, Tel: (415) 354-2700, for defendants;
Justin Knight, of Gordon Rees Scully Mansukhani, LLP, Tel: (415) 875-3133, for cross-defendants.

RULING: The Court adopts its tentative ruling. CROSS DEFENDANT JOHN KITHAS, CHRISTOPHER LAND's Motion For Sanctions Against Brandi Thomas granted in part, and denied in part. Defendant Brandi Thomas to provide Code compliant responses to moving parties' discovery requests within (2) two weeks of the date of this Order. Defendant Thomas is ordered to pay sanctions in the amount of $3,000.00 within (2) two weeks of the date of this Order. Moving party's request for issue and evidentiary sanctions is denied. Both parties shall simultaneously submit one-page letter briefs by Friday, October 11, 2024. The Court will issue an order.

Judge Pro Tem: Andy Scwartz; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 525.

Notice Of And Motion For Sanctions Against Brandi Thomas By John A. Kithas And Christopher Land
Off Calendar Sep-26-2024 Continued To Oct-04-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Douglas Reinbold, of Law Offices of John A. Kithas, Tel: (415) 788-8100, for plaintiffs;
Chris Land, of Law Offices of John A. Kithas, Tel: (415) 788-8100, for plaintiffs;
Paul Frassetto, of Frassetto Law Offices, Tel: (415) 354-2700, for defendants.

RULING: ARGUED. CROSS DEFENDANT JOHN KITHAS, CHRISTOPHER LAND's Motion For Sanctions Against Brandi Thomas By John A. Kithas And Christopher Land is continued to October 4, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Department 525, Discovery. Counsel may appear by Zoom unless otherwise stated in the Court's tentative ruling.

Judge Pro Tem: Andy Schwartz; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 525.

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows:

Defense attorney's unopposed Motion to Be Relieved as Counsel is granted.

Court to review the mandatory Judicial Council form of order that was submitted by counsel for the prevailing party.
